examples: I would only belong to an environmental movement if it was explicitly nonviolent.
After critiquing the so-called thin ideal by writing essays and role playing with their peers, participants are directed to come up with and execute small, nonviolent acts.
The judiciary must think very hard before jailing nonviolent offenders.
The nonviolent game group played S3K Superbike, Dirt2 and Pure (also in random order).
Still, he wanted to make the point that games should have more nonviolent options.
